loss_conditions.note: Replaced on new faith adoption
Lost after 3 biased mediations

value.description: Overrides all other behavior when bonded target is threatened
The bond does not break — it inverts. Soul-Tethered becomes Widow's Frost.

loss_conditions.note: Converts to W_widows_frost on target death

value.description: Drops current task to defend the oath-brother when threatened
Active drive to damage, undermine, or destroy the grudge target
Resolution does not mean peace — it means looking at what the hate cost you
Death without confrontation leaves the wound unaddressed; grief and rage with nowhere to go

loss_conditions.note: Lost on revenge completion or target death

value.description: Automatically prioritizes protecting children and young agents in range
Seeks opportunities to pass on knowledge and skills to younger agents
Continuously monitors social signals for early warning of betrayal; interprets ambiguity as threat
After healing, they try again — tentatively, watching for exits

loss_conditions.note: Lost after secure attachment + 10 years

value.description: Actively moves to shield followers from harm; identity is bound to their survival
Without the pack, the alpha is structurally undefined; the identity collapses with the role

loss_conditions.note: Lost when followers drop below 5

value.description: The first real closeness after years alone triggers acute disorientation and fear

loss_conditions.note: Lost when intimacy 60+ formed

value.description: Gravitates toward the target's presence without fully understanding the pull
The decay end is not healing exactly — it is the exhaustion of hope, which feels like peace
Perpetually scouts the social landscape for the next worthy leader to back
Without a leader to uphold, the kingmaker has no frame for the self; the role collapses

loss_conditions.note: Lost when all supported leaders fail

value.description: The mirror breaks. What was visible only through them becomes inaccessible; a part of the self goes dark.
Distance slowly dissolves the resonance; the bond fades like a reflected image losing its source

loss_conditions.note: Lost on target death or 5 year separation

value.description: Prioritizes safety of the one who saved them
Debt discharged; bond transforms from obligation to chosen loyalty

loss_conditions.note: Lost when debt repaid (saving benefactor)

value.description: Simultaneous pride and bitterness; cannot fully resolve into either
Defaults to solving problems alone before seeking help
Driven to record, tell, or monument the names of those who came before
The line continues; grief unlocks into relief and overwhelming joy

loss_conditions.note: Converts on child birth

value.description: Defends chosen family with the same urgency as blood kin
The family has collapsed below the threshold that made it real

loss_conditions.note: Lost when 3+ members leave/die

value.description: Attentive to the present; knows it can be taken without warning
Regularly checks on enemy's location, health, and actions
The organizing purpose of hatred is gone; what remains when the enemy is silent?

loss_conditions.note: Emptiness after target death

value.description: Treats the foster child's safety as a primary behavioral imperative
Naturally acts as informal channel between the two factions
Being made to choose violates the core of who they are between these people
One bank has washed away; the river no longer has two sides to hold

loss_conditions.note: Lost when one faction collapses

value.description: Naturally drawn to those in mourning; knows how to be present without fixing

loss_conditions.note: Lost when any required trait is lost
